items.claim: Arman Tsarukyan is the clear number one contender for the title.
items.quote: Arman Sukian's been waiting in the wings for a title shot. He's been active competing in grappling and wrestling. ... Obviously, a guy that we want to see fight for gold.

items.claim: Justin Gaethje has a strong personal dislike for Conor McGregor.
items.quote: He hates Conor McGregor. Like he does not like he hates him in a way where he doesn't even want to entertain the fight.

items.claim: Ilia Topuria is a 'blown-up' 145-pounder who lacks the size for the lightweight division.
items.quote: I don't know. It took Justin Gachi to really show Ilia Tapori as a blownup 145.

items.claim: Justin Gaethje possesses high durability and the ability to absorb clean strikes to the jaw.
items.quote: Ilia was landing clean. Ilia was hitting him with that, too. Bang, he was hitting him right in the beard. Bang, he was hitting him in the jaw. Justin Gate ate that [ __ ] up.

items.claim: Ilia Topuria's performance against Justin Gaethje demonstrated that he is too small to move up to the 170-pound division.
items.quote: talking about moving up to 170, how silly does that look now, AJ? ... Never. Never. This dude's This dude's too too small for lightweight.
